R10dpt.new_value: If none of the above apply and your code still isn't working, please contact [Discord support]({supportLink}) with your card details and a photo of the back of the card.
R10dpt.old_value: If none of the above apply and your code still isn't working, please contact [Discord support](https://support.discord.com/) with your card details and a photo of the back of the card.

hanRXM.new_value: Digital gift cards are available in the US at select retailers. Physical cards are coming soon, check out our [Help Center]({helpCenterLink}) for the latest on where to buy.
hanRXM.old_value: Digital gift cards are available in the US at select retailers. Physical cards are coming soon, check out our [Help Center](https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/41159846304279) for the latest on where to buy.

yLPgno.new_value: **Wrong Country?** Gift cards can only be redeemed in the country they were purchased in. If your [Country/Region]({countryRegionLink}) doesn't match the card's currency, redemption will be blocked. You can see what region your account is set to under Country/Region in User Settings > Billing > Payments.
yLPgno.old_value: **Wrong Country?** Gift cards can only be redeemed in the country they were purchased in. If your [Country/Region](https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/39799791912087-Country-Region-Setting) doesn't match the card's currency, redemption will be blocked. You can see what region your account is set to under Country/Region in User Settings > Billing > Payments.
